headline: Harry Wilson
body: Leeds United confirm Harry Wilson has joined on a four-year contract. Wilson a free agent after leaving Fulham. Leeds fought off competition from Champions League clubs.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿
raw_text:
Leeds United confirm Harry Wilson has joined on a four-year contract. 

Wilson a free agent after leaving Fulham.

Leeds fought off competition from Champions League clubs.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿
